'''''Basilisk''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that was placed under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mullinore]], who served as part of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s squadron of four [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]]. The [[Warship/Legends|warship]], like its sister vessels, had been assigned to guard the top-secret [[Maw Installation]], but when Daala chose to embark upon a [[Daala campaign|campaign]] of guerrilla warfare against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the ''Basilisk'' was heavily damaged when [[Kyp Durron]] detonated the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]] with the [[Sun Crusher]].

==History==
After the destruction of the [[Hydra (Imperial I-class)|''Hydra'']], Daala ordered the ''Basilisk'' to pursue the [[Sun Crusher]] piloted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Kyp Durron]] and was caught in a battle between [[Moruth Doole]]'s [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] forces and the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. During the battle against Daala, ''Basilisk'' sustained heavy damage.

''Basilisk'' would go on to participate in actions against a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] colony on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] and in an [[Attack on Mon Calamari|assault]] on the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] homeworld of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]—where its sister ship, the ''[[Manticore]]'', was lost in combat.

After the battle, ''Basilisk'' and ''[[Gorgon]]'' retreated to the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]] where Daala hatched a plan to drive the ''Basilisk'' into the surface of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with a skeleton crew, but the plot was foiled when Durron arrived with the ''Sun Crusher'' and set the nebula into supernova. ''Basilisk'' was caught in the explosions. Fortunately the majority of the crew was transferred to the ''Gorgon'', leaving a minor amount of crew aboard when it was destroyed. It also is notable that apart from Captain [[Mullinore]], the crew that did die in the supernova were all [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]].
